project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Set up Turborepo monorepo workspace
description: Initialize the monorepo with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo. Define the pipeline for build, dev, and lint tasks across all packages.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Configure Fastify server with TypeScript
description: Bootstrap the Fastify app inside apps/api with full TypeScript support, tsconfig path aliases, and a working dev server via tsx.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Integrate TanStack Query with React
description: Set up QueryClient and QueryClientProvider in the React app. Add TanStack Query Devtools for development builds.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Add shared ESLint config package
description: Create the packages/eslint-config package with base, node, and react-internal presets. Wire it up to all apps and packages.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Configure pnpm workspace dependencies
description: Audit pnpm-workspace.yaml and package.json files to ensure internal packages are correctly referenced with workspace: protocol.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Implement API route validation with Zod
description: Add Zod schemas for all Fastify route inputs and outputs. Use fastify-type-provider-zod to wire schemas into the route definitions.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Set up database connection layer
description: Evaluate and configure a database client (Drizzle or Prisma) with connection pooling. Add a health-check route that pings the DB.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Initialize Vite + React project
description: Scaffold the web app using Vite with the React + TypeScript template. Set output directory and base URL for production builds.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Configure TypeScript strict mode
description: Enable strict: true in all tsconfig.json files. Fix resulting type errors across the codebase.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Set up turbo.json pipeline
description: Define build, dev, lint, and format tasks in turbo.json with correct dependency ordering and caching configuration.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Add Prettier configuration
description: Add a root prettier.config.js with consistent formatting rules. Integrate with ESLint via eslint-config-prettier.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Set up end-to-end tests with Playwright
description: Install Playwright, configure the test runner, and write a smoke test covering the main navigation routes.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Integrate OpenAPI spec generation
description: Use @fastify/swagger and @fastify/swagger-ui to auto-generate and serve an OpenAPI 3 spec from the existing route schemas.

project.name: Core Platform
project.description: Monorepo infrastructure, build pipeline, API server, and shared tooling.

title: Add structured logging with Pino
description: Configure Pino as the Fastify logger with pretty-printing in development and JSON output in production.

project.name: Authentication
project.description: User identity, session management, and role-based access control via Clerk.

title: Implement Clerk authentication provider
description: Wrap the React app with ClerkProvider using the publishable key from environment variables. Gate protected routes with the auth middleware.

project.name: Authentication
project.description: User identity, session management, and role-based access control via Clerk.

title: Add JWT token refresh logic
description: Implement silent token refresh on the Fastify side using Clerk's backend SDK. Return 401 with a refresh hint when the token is near expiry.

project.name: Authentication
project.description: User identity, session management, and role-based access control via Clerk.

title: Install and configure Clerk SDK
description: Add @clerk/clerk-react and @clerk/fastify to the workspace. Set up environment variable validation at app startup.

project.name: Authentication
project.description: User identity, session management, and role-based access control via Clerk.

title: Add user profile page
description: Create a /profile route that renders Clerk's UserProfile component inside the app shell.

project.name: Authentication
project.description: User identity, session management, and role-based access control via Clerk.

title: Implement role-based access control
description: Define roles (admin, member, viewer) in Clerk organization metadata. Enforce them in Fastify route hooks and conditionally render UI elements.

project.name: UI Components
project.description: Shared React component library built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

title: Set up shadcn/ui component library
description: Run the shadcn/ui init wizard in the packages/ui package. Configure components.json, Tailwind, and CSS variables for theming.

project.name: UI Components
project.description: Shared React component library built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

title: Create base Button component
description: Build the Button component using shadcn/ui primitives with variant support (default, destructive, outline, ghost, link) and size props.

project.name: UI Components
project.description: Shared React component library built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

title: Add Tailwind CSS configuration
description: Install Tailwind CSS and configure tailwind.config.ts with content paths covering all packages. Set up the base CSS layer.

project.name: UI Components
project.description: Shared React component library built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

title: Install and configure shadcn/ui
description: Add shadcn/ui to the packages/ui workspace package and export all installed components via a barrel index.ts.

project.name: UI Components
project.description: Shared React component library built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

title: Create Input component
description: Add the shadcn/ui Input component to the shared UI package. Include a FormField wrapper with label and error message slots.

project.name: UI Components
project.description: Shared React component library built on shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS.

title: Create data table component
description: Build a reusable DataTable component on top of TanStack Table with sorting, filtering, and pagination built in.
